meta.subject: VACUUM
meta.note: VACUUM INTO supported; plain in-place VACUUM is experimental

setup:
CREATE TABLE t(a INT, b INT);
INSERT INTO t VALUES (1, 2), (2, 3);

sql: SELECT rank() OVER (ORDER BY x) FROM t;
setup:
CREATE TABLE t(x INT);
INSERT INTO t VALUES (1), (2), (3);

meta.subject: WINDOW functions
meta.note: Only `row_number()` and aggregate `… OVER (…)` work. Missing: `rank`, `dense_rank`, `percent_rank`, `cume_dist`, `ntile`, `lag`, `lead`, `first_value`, `last_value`, `nth_value`. Custom frame specs (`ROWS`/`RANGE`/`GROUPS BETWEEN`, `EXCLUDE`) not yet supported. `agg(…) FILTER (…) OVER (…)` **panics**.

sql: CREATE TABLE t(a INT GENERATED ALWAYS AS (a + 1) VIRTUAL);

meta.subject: GENERATED
meta.note: virtual columns only (no ALTER, partial affinity support). Requires `--experimental-generated-columns`.

sql: CREATE TABLE t(a INT PRIMARY KEY, b TEXT) WITHOUT ROWID;

meta.subject: WITHOUT ROWID
meta.note: Requires `--experimental-without-rowid`. Effectively **insert-only**: CREATE / INSERT / SELECT work (incl. composite PK), but UPDATE, DELETE, UPSERT, `INSERT OR REPLACE`, secondary UNIQUE constraints, secondary `CREATE INDEX`, `FOREIGN KEY`, CDC, and materialized views are all rejected. AUTOINCREMENT and missing PK rejection are parity with SQLite.

setup:
CREATE TABLE base(a INT);
CREATE VIEW v AS SELECT a FROM base;

meta.subject: CREATE TRIGGER ... INSTEAD OF
meta.note: Triggers on views are not supported. Currently errors with misleading "no such table" message.

sql: CREATE VIEW IF NOT EXISTS v AS SELECT 2 AS x;
setup: CREATE VIEW v AS SELECT 1 AS x;

meta.subject: CREATE VIEW IF NOT EXISTS
meta.note: Not idempotent — second create on an existing view errors instead of no-op.

meta.subject: PRAGMA module_list
meta.note: Works, but only `completion` and `generate_series` are registered modules

setup:
CREATE TABLE t(a INT);
INSERT INTO t VALUES (1);

sql: SELECT sum(v) FILTER (WHERE v > 15) FROM t GROUP BY g;
setup:
CREATE TABLE t(g INT, v INT);
INSERT INTO t VALUES (1, 10), (1, 20), (2, 30);

sql: SELECT lag(x, 1) OVER (ORDER BY x) FROM t;
setup:
CREATE TABLE t(x INT);
INSERT INTO t VALUES (1), (2), (3);

meta.subject: ... OVER (...)
meta.note: Supported for aggregate functions and ROW_NUMBER()

meta.subject: COLLATE
meta.note: Custom collations not supported. **Bug:** unknown collation names are silently treated as the default instead of erroring (SQLite errors with "no such collation sequence").

sql: SELECT content FROM docs WHERE content MATCH 'hello';
setup:
CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE docs USING fts5(content);
INSERT INTO docs(content) VALUES ('hello world');

CREATE TABLE t(a INT, b INT);
INSERT INTO t VALUES (1, 2);

meta.subject: x <operator> (SELECT...))
meta.note: Only scalar subqueries supported, i.e. not (x,y) = (SELECT...)

sql: UPDATE t SET a = 2; SELECT changes();
setup:
CREATE TABLE t(a INT);
INSERT INTO t VALUES (1);

meta.subject: changes()
meta.note: Still need to support update statements and triggers

setup:
CREATE TABLE t(a INT);
INSERT INTO t VALUES (1);

sql: UPDATE t SET a = 2; SELECT total_changes();
setup:
CREATE TABLE t(a INT);
INSERT INTO t VALUES (1);

meta.subject: total_changes()
meta.note: Still need to support update statements and triggers

meta.subject: sqlite3_open_v2
meta.note: URI filenames parsed; VFS parameter ignored

meta.subject: ReadCookie
meta.note: no temp databases, only user_version supported

meta.subject: ResetSorter
meta.note: sorter cursors are not supported yet; only ephemeral tables are
